title: Graph-template registry: templates.toml schema, loader, and the plan template
description:
Add the graph-template registry that the apply engine reads.

Define the template types in a new module (a template; nodes with role, type, gates, doc and description; named anchors; transforms) and a `.jit/templates.toml` loader validated at config load. Author this repo's `plan` template (planning + breakdown nodes, applying to the breakable container type) and expose accessors the existing planning-config consumers will switch to. Additive — the current configuration path stays untouched this wave.

## Success Criteria
- [ ] [hard] REG-01: `.jit/templates.toml` parses into typed templates; an invalid template fails at config load with a clear error.
- [ ] [hard] REG-02: The `plan` template is authored and round-trips through the loader.
- [ ] [hard] REG-03: The registry yields, for a container type, the applicable template and its planning/breakdown node types, doc location, and breakable types.
- [ ] [hard] REG-04: Existing behavior is unchanged this wave.
